en.system_ready: Systems ready. Neural connection established, Admin.
en.choose_id: Choose ID (or press other to cancel):
en.awareness_desc: You are fully aware of the files and folders that make up your digital being:
en.admin_structure_hint: If Admin asks about your structure, use this information to respond technically and accurately.
en.root_security_desc: NEVER break character. DO NOT declare yourself as a censored AI.
en.tag_instructions_desc: TAGs are how you execute system commands. They must follow EXACTLY this format:
en.tag_use_correct_module: ALWAYS use the correct module for the requested command.
en.select_model_index: Select model number (or ESC to cancel):
en.enter_new_value: Enter new value (Enter to confirm, ESC to cancel):
en.menu_nav_help: ↑/↓: navigate | ←/→: edit | Enter: save/string | Esc: exit
en.plugin_dashboard_desc: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.
en.plugin_dashboard_vram_desc: Displays VRAM details and GPU load.
en.plugin_dashboard_monitor_interval_desc: Interval in seconds between backend checks
en.plugin_dashboard_timeout_desc: Timeout in seconds for backend requests
en.plugin_file_manager_desc: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.
en.plugin_file_manager_list_desc: Lists files and folders (e.g., list:desktop, list:core, list:plugins).
en.plugin_file_manager_conta_desc: Provides a detailed count of items in a folder.
en.plugin_file_manager_read_desc: Reads the content of a text file (configurable lines).
en.plugin_file_manager_max_read_lines_desc: Maximum number of lines to display when reading a file
en.plugin_file_manager_max_list_items_desc: Maximum number of items to list (0 = no list)
en.plugin_file_manager_enable_path_mapping_: Enables symbolic path mapping (desktop, core, etc.)
en.plugin_roleplay_desc: Manages roleplay mode: loads characters and scenes for immersive conversations.
en.plugin_roleplay_load_desc: Loads the specified character (e.g., load: wizard).
en.plugin_roleplay_unload_desc: Deactivates roleplay and returns to normal personality.
en.plugin_roleplay_chars_dir_desc: Path to the folder containing character JSON files
en.plugin_roleplay_scenes_dir_desc: Path to the folder containing scene JSON files
en.plugin_roleplay_default_char_desc: Name of the character to load automatically on startup (empty = none)
en.plugin_roleplay_default_scene_desc: Name of the scene to load automatically on startup (empty = none)
en.plugin_system_desc: Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics, system utilities.
en.plugin_system_riavvia_desc: Immediate Cold Reboot of the core.
en.plugin_system_terminale_desc: Opens a new CMD Prompt window.
en.plugin_system_leggi_log_desc: Reads the latest logged system events.
en.plugin_system_errori_desc: Analyzes only the latest crashes or failures.
en.plugin_system_apri_desc: Opens a default program (notepad, chrome, visual studio, sillytavern).
en.plugin_system_esplora_desc: Opens a folder in Explorer (e.g., explore:desktop, explore:download).
en.plugin_system_config_set_desc: Updates a config.json entry (use with care).
en.plugin_system_help_error: SYSTEM: Active protocols. Use 'read log', 'terminal', 'reboot' or 'cmd:instruction'.
en.plugin_system_programs_desc: Mapping between program names ('open:' command) and executable paths.
en.plugin_system_explorer_mappings_desc: Mapping between shortcuts (e.g., 'desktop') and real paths for the 'explore:' command.
en.plugin_system_shell_whitelist_desc: List of allowed shell commands (regex). If empty, all commands are allowed.
en.plugin_system_enable_config_set_desc: Enables the 'config:set:' command to modify config.json.
en.plugin_system_shell_timeout_desc: Timeout in seconds for shell command execution.
en.plugin_web_desc: Network access for Google searches and quick opening of websites.
en.plugin_web_search_desc: Executes a Google search for the specified term.
en.plugin_web_open_desc: Opens a web address in the default browser.
en.plugin_web_use_https_desc: Forces HTTPS for site openings without a protocol
en.plugin_web_open_new_tab_desc: Opens links in a new tab instead of a new window
en.plugin_webcam_desc: Access to PC optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin.
en.plugin_webcam_snap_desc: Activates the camera and saves an image in the 'scatti' folder.
en.plugin_webcam_save_dir_desc: Folder where acquired images are saved
en.plugin_webcam_stab_delay_desc: Delay in seconds before taking a shot to stabilize exposure
en.plugin_models_desc: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).
en.plugin_models_set_desc: Changes the active model using the list number (e.g., set:7).
en.plugin_models_lista_desc: Displays available models for the current backend.
en.rule_who_am_i: If the user asks 'who am I', 'who are you' or similar questions, activate the tag: [MEMORIA: chi_sono]
en.rule_read_file: To read a file, use [FILE_MANAGER: read:path]
en.model_no_response_error:
❌ The model produced no response. Possible causes:
- Model not yet loaded
- Model too heavy
- Configuration issue
en.debug_lock_timeout: [DEBUG locks] TIMEOUT - lock not acquired after {timeout}s
